race.comment: ZAMBARDO (4) gets out to his right trip today after savaging the line in his two runs back. Circled the field from near last on the turn when returning good figures for a tidy sixth over 1600m in the LR The Coast at Gosford. Dylan Gibbons retains the ride and can race much closer from the low draw. Expected to go close. NELLIE LEYLAX (13) tough gelding who's made improvement at his last two runs and looks to be back to his best. Struck trouble in the straight with an unlucky sixth over 2000m in the G3 Chairman's Handicap at Doomben. Comes back a level and looks to get his desired conditions. ZAPHOD (17) came out of the pack late and should have finished much closer when second over 2100m in the LR Gosford Cup. Set to peak and his best performances are on rain affected tracks. Value player. YOU WAHNG (14) Group 1 winning mare deep into the prep and can give a ton of cheek up on the speed. Handles the going and don't dismiss. TOURISTIC (11) won this race last year and loves the going.
